case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUCRECIA CACERES RIVAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUCRECIA CACERES RIVAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVAS, LUCRECIA CACERES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, LUCRECIA CACERES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED DEC-27-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, LUCRECIA CACERES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
